title: Tutor (Part-Time and Full-Time)
description:
The ideal candidate will be a confident communicator with the ability to build and maintain relationships with young learners and work with a professional development team committed to working with people. The candidate will have the ability to demonstrate organizational, presentation and communication skills.

Responsibilities

  • Providing one-on-one and group classes and adapting teaching methods to engage and support students with different learning styles and abilities.
  • Creating detailed lesson plans that outline the objectives, instructional methods, activities, and assessments for each class.
  • Designing and administering assessments (quizzes, tests, projects) to evaluate student progress.
  • Providing timely and constructive feedback on student work and assigning grades.
  • Establishing and maintaining a positive and productive classroom environment that promotes learning.
  • Engaging in ongoing professional development to stay current with best practices, educational research, and new teaching technologies.
  • Maintaining open and regular communication with the class consultants to keep them informed about student progress, behaviour, and any concerns.
  • Collaborating with other teachers, administrators, and support staff to improve the overall educational experience and support students with diverse needs.

Requirements

  • Degree in the related field.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to foster strong relationships with young learners.
  • Collaborative work approach with a professional development team, demonstrating strong engagement with students.
  • Strong organizational, presentation, and communication skills.
  • Extensive experience in teaching primary school and kindergarten children.
  • Proficiency in creating tailored lesson plans to meet the diverse needs of students.

postedCompany.description: ASE Education Group Pte Ltd is headquartered in Singapore, and has branches in Australia and China. We are an educational organization that provides a teaching curriculum and combines online and offline learning tuitions. We provide various educational programs for kindergarten, elementary, and secondary students who need to consolidate their learning and improve their academic results in English, Math, Science, Chinese, etc.
postedCompany.name: ASE EDUCATION GROUP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
